title: NUPENG’s Heinous Plot To Hijack PTD Branch Will Fail – Comrade Obi-Dede Wonder Cries Out - FinancialEDGE
description: An elder and key stakeholder in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG, Comrade Obi-Dede Wonder has made scathing remarks about his Union, alleging that under the current leadership of Comrades Williams Akporeha (President), Afolabi Olawale (General Secretary) and Salimon Akanni Oladiti (National Trustee) an agenda had been hatched to carry out systematic take
html: An elder and key stakeholder in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG, Comrade Obi-Dede Wonder has made scathing remarks about his Union, alleging that under the current leadership of Comrades Williams Akporeha (President), Afolabi Olawale (General Secretary) and Salimon Akanni Oladiti (National Trustee) an agenda had been hatched to carry out systematic take over of the Union’s most viable arm (PTD) for selfish and pecuniary gains.
